# terrible_community_general_ejabberd_user (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) The ejabberd host associated with this username.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `username` (String) The name of the user to manage.

### Optional

- `password` (String) The password to assign to the username.
- `state` (String) Describe the desired state of the user to be managed.
